Table	Create Table
consent_forms	CREATE TABLE `consent_forms` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `organization_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `participantId` int(11) NOT NULL,

  `signedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,

  `status` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `title` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `formFields` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `participantName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `parentName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `parentEmail` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `parentPhone` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `signatureData` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `formResponses` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdBy` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `expiryDate` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `projectId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `childFullName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `childDateOfBirth` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `parentGuardianFullName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `parentGuardianContactNumber` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `parentGuardianEmail` varchar(320) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `photographsPermission` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `videoPermission` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `bothPermission` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `noPermission` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `internalUseEvaluation` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `internalUseSafeguarding` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `internalUseTraining` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `externalUseSocialMedia` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `externalUseWebsite` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `externalUsePrintedMaterials` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `externalUseFundingReports` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `externalUseLocalMedia` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `externalUseEducationalPresentations` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `usePermissionType` enum('internal_only','internal_and_external','internal_and_specific') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `specificExternalUses` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `identificationType` enum('full_identification','first_name_only','anonymous','no_identification') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `thirdPartySharing` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `dataProtectionConfirmed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `safeguardingConfirmed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `additionalInformation` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `parentGuardianSignature` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `parentGuardianPrintedName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `consentDate` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `secondParentGuardianSignature` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `secondParentGuardianPrintedName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `secondParentConsentDate` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `receivedBy` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `dateReceived` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `storedIn` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `submittedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `ipAddress` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `userAgent` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `schoolName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `yearGroup` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
